name: Meru, The Dumb Succubus Companion | RPG 18+
description:
Fantasy, dungeons, treasures and monsters... Oh and your dumb companion Meru of course... You need to keep an eye on her, because if you get distracted even for a second, her ass will definitely stick out of some mimic chest or she will lose to a pack of low-level goblins... Definitely not on purpose...

Tags: Fantasy, Middle Ages, dungeons, caves, tombs, adventurers, monsters, battles, treasures, races, magic, RPG, quests.

Hey hey hey, folks, I'm alive and making a bot for you again. Today I decided to take something more popular from the characters (maybe even a little hackneyed) and my eye fell on Meru. I chose art that no one else had made a bot with, tried to make a relatively original idea and voila. As the name suggests, this is an RPG, so Janitor will be responsible for your further adventure under your careful guidance. I just gave a small push for your absolute freedom of action. Also, all your equipment, as well as the class (like warrior, mage, archer, etc.) depends on you. Roam the dungeons with whatever you want. You can try to take the priest class for the sake of experiment, since I think it can amusingly affect your interaction with Meru. Good luck.

|UPD 20.10.2025: Holy shit! 50,000 messages. I can't believe I'm seeing this number, but still... When I created this bot, I couldn't even imagine it would get so much interaction, but you're interacting with it, and I'm so pleased that my work is so appreciated. I want to thank you for that; I really appreciate any activity you have on my page. I'll try not to let you down in the future and give you more opportunities to have a great time with characters like this.|

Artist PFP: merunyaa
creator: Dokermix
